pageHero.title: Platforms & Tools
pageHero.subtitle: Essential platforms for practice, mock interviews, and reference material.

cards.title: LeetCode
cards.description: The standard for coding practice. Free tier has most problems. Focus on the curated lists (Blind 75, NeetCode 150) not random grinding.

cards.title: NeetCode.io
cards.description: Structured roadmap organized by pattern. NeetCode 150 and Blind 75 curated lists with video explanations. Quality over quantity.

cards.title: HackerRank
cards.description: Comprehensive free coding practice. Algorithms, data structures, SQL, functional programming across dozens of languages.

cards.title: Grind 75
cards.description: By the Tech Interview Handbook creator. Customizable study plan based on your time available. Picks optimal problems for maximum coverage.

cards.title: Pramp
cards.description: Free peer-to-peer mock interviews. You interview them, they interview you. Simulates real pressure with a real person watching.

cards.title: Interviewing.io
cards.description: Anonymous mock interviews with engineers from top companies. Free tier available. Get real feedback from experienced interviewers.

cards.title: ByteByteGo
cards.description: By Alex Xu. Deep dives into 50+ real-world architectures. Updated for 2026 with serverless, edge computing, and LLM integrations.

cards.title: System Design Handbook
cards.description: Complete reference for system design interviews. Comprehensive guide covering all major topics and patterns for 2026.

cards.title: Tech Interview Handbook
cards.description: Free, curated interview preparation materials. Covers coding, system design, behavioral, resume tips, and negotiation. Community-driven.

cards.title: GitHub Copilot
cards.description: Practice coding with AI assistance. Learn to use it efficiently for interviews that allow AI tools. Available in VS Code and JetBrains.

cards.title: Claude (Anthropic)
cards.description: Use for practicing problem-solving dialogue, explaining your approach, and getting feedback on solutions. Great for behavioral prep too.

cards.title: Cursor
cards.description: AI-powered code editor. Practice pair-programming with AI in a real IDE environment. Some companies use similar setups in interviews.
